signals.npcLine: Markets flicker; fear hangs thick in the neon air.
signals.questPulse: Find the cause behind the sudden crypto jitters.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto markets wobble, cautious eyes watch digital gold.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable assets spark shadow trades under streetlamp glow.

signals.npcLine: SPK and ASTEROID buzz hotter than static tonight.
signals.questPulse: Extract data on trending tokens stirring the underground.
signals.worldFeed: Two tokens rise amid market whispers and shadow deals.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted channels leak chatter on CHIP and PENGU spikes.

signals.npcLine: RAVE pulses across data streams; something’s stirring deep.
signals.questPulse: Decode RAVE's surge to tap hidden market flows.
signals.worldFeed: Neon traders eye RAVE’s sudden burst through firewalls.
signals.clueEvent: Flash trades hint at secret alpha in RAVE token.

signals.npcLine: Fear feeds chaos; stabilize the system before it fractures.
signals.questPulse: Neutralize market panic by securing key exchanges' backdoors.
signals.worldFeed: Fear index spikes, hackers scent weakness in the grid.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted panic signals disrupt stability protocols citywide.
